About

Designing at the
intersection of craft
& function.

Results-driven UI/UX Designer with a track record of improving user engagement by up to 30%. Adept at cross-functional collaboration with developers and stakeholders to ship scalable, accessible, and business-aligned digital experiences.

Experience

May 2023 — Dec 2025
Close5 (eBay)
Visual Designer
  • Collaborated directly with clients in an Agile environment to research user needs, define design requirements, and deliver high-fidelity prototypes.
  • Designed and prototyped an award-winning iPad application for NorthStar Memorial Services; conducted onsite usability testing across multiple US locations.
  • Architected and launched the first-ever beekeeping web application serving a global user base, establishing UX patterns and design systems from scratch.
  • Designed an Android parental-control application featuring real-time tablet usage monitoring, improving session clarity and parent satisfaction.
  • Led end-to-end UX and UI design for a high-converting eCommerce platform for Legarza Industries covering all customer touchpoints.
